A.text: Between the two plates, the electric field lines point from plate 2 toward plate 1.

B.text: The electric field lines around plate 2 exhibit a convergent pattern.

C.text: The electric field lines around plate 1 exhibit a divergent pattern.

D.text: Electric field lines can cross in space.

parsed.answer_value: Between the two plates, the electric field lines point from plate 2 toward plate 1.
parsed.rationale: The arrows on the electric field lines indicate the direction of the field, which is from the positive plate (plate 2) to the negative plate (plate 1).
